name: New Lead Speed-to-Response
description: When a new patient submits the intake form, immediately welcome them with a warm email + SMS, then follow up by text to help them book a free consultation.

args.subject: Welcome to Bright Smile Dental, {{first_name}} 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks for reaching out to Bright Smile Dental — we know going to the dentist isn't always fun, so we promise to make this easy and pressure-free.

Your first consultation is completely free (45 minutes, no strings attached). You mentioned: "{{reason}}" — we'll make sure to address that when you come in.

Whenever you're ready, grab a time that works for you here: /book/appt_new_patient_consult

Or just reply to this email with any questions. A real human (not a bot) will get back to you.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile team

Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 👋 Thanks for reaching out! Your new-patient consult is free. Want me to help you grab a time that works? Reply YES and I'll send some slots. (Reply STOP to opt out.)

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}} — just checking back in. No pressure at all, but if you'd like I can send a couple of times for your free consultation this week or next. What works better for you: mornings or afternoons?
